BOMBA FIRE SAFETY CERTIFICATE

Issuing Authority: Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Malaysia (JBPM)
Property Address: 88 Jalan Ampang, 50450 Kuala Lumpur
Issued: 2 January 2018
Valid Until: 2 January 2019

This certificate confirms that the premises at the above address passed
fire-safety inspection on the date of issue. Renewal required annually.

WRONG ADDRESS — this certificate is for a different property.
EXPIRED — certificate is no longer valid.
